items.title: Anwar's 'sane people' jab lands as questions swirl over Trump

children.content: The world is stuck watching a performative series of announcements about meetings that could, may, will happen, involving a president not dealing with the reality that he is in a weak and confused bargaining position.

items.title: Iran, Trump clash over US blockade during peace talks

children.content: US President Donald Trump says he intends to keep up his naval blockade of Iran until a peace agreement is signed, putting him at odds with Iran's foreign ministry, which says the blockade is a breach of the US's ceasefire commitments. Follow live.

image.altText: Donald Trump gestures as he speaks to reporters in front of Air Force One.

items.title: The PM is not about to pick a fight over a gas tax

items.title: Winners and losers emerge in volatile airfare market
